RPR2 signature analysis in RPM-RPMA dataset (Figure 2 + Extended Data Figure 5)

2026-03-31

RPM_RPMA_07_2025_TBO_CellTag_Seurat_wSigs_FA_dpt_final <- readRDS("/labs/julsage/Debbie/RPM single cell/RPM_organoids/RPM_RPMA_07_2025_TBO_CellTag_Seurat_wSigs_FA_dpt_final.rds")

RPM_RPMA = RPM_RPMA_07_2025_TBO_CellTag_Seurat_wSigs_FA_dpt_final
Idents(RPM_RPMA) = "Pheno"

#Import RPR2 signatures( Supplementary Table S4)
arc_1_30 <- read_csv("/labs/julsage/Debbie/multiome_data/analysis_2/arc_1_30.csv")
arc_2_30 <- read_csv("/labs/julsage/Debbie/multiome_data/analysis_2/arc_2_30.csv")
arc_3_30 <- read_csv("/labs/julsage/Debbie/multiome_data/analysis_2/arc_3_30.csv")
arc_4_30 <- read_csv("/labs/julsage/Debbie/multiome_data/analysis_2/arc_4_30.csv")
arc_5_30 <- read_csv("/labs/julsage/Debbie/multiome_data/analysis_2/arc_5_30.csv")
arc_6_30 <- read_csv("/labs/julsage/Debbie/multiome_data/analysis_2/arc_6_30.csv")

#Add signature score
sig_list <- list(
  Intermediate = arc_1_30$gene,
  NE1          = arc_5_30$gene,
  NE2          = arc_6_30$gene,
  nonNE1       = arc_4_30$gene,
  nonNE2       = arc_2_30$gene,
  secretory    = arc_3_30$gene
)

for (nm in names(sig_list)) {
  RPM_RPMA <- AddModuleScore(
    object = RPM_RPMA,
    features = list(sig_list[[nm]]),
    name = paste0(nm, "_score"),
    assay = "RNA"
  )
}

###Figure 2b-d
Genotype = DimPlot(RPM_RPMA, reduction = "umap",group.by = "Genotype", cols = c("#000080", "#E69F00"))

NE1 = FeaturePlot(RPM_RPMA, features ="NE1_score1", min.cutoff = "q20",max.cutoff = "q90", reduction = "umap", order = TRUE)+scale_colour_gradientn(colours = viridis(100, option = "cividis"))+ ggtitle("NE1 signature")

Intermediate = FeaturePlot(RPM_RPMA, features ="Intermediate_score1", min.cutoff = "q20",max.cutoff = "q90", reduction = "umap", order = TRUE)+scale_colour_gradientn(colours = viridis(100, option = "cividis"))+ ggtitle("Intermediate signature")

Genotype+NE1+Intermediate

###Figure 2e
DotPlot(RPM_RPMA, features = c("NE1_score1","NE2_score1", "secretory_score1","Intermediate_score1","nonNE1_score1","nonNE2_score1"),col.max = 1.5, scale.max = 100, dot.min = 0,dot.scale = 8)+ scale_colour_gradient2(low = "#1B7837FF", mid = "#f7f7f7", high = "#762A83FF")+RotatedAxis()+coord_flip()+xlab("") +ylab("")

# Compute annotation label for two genotypes
get_cliff_label <- function(data, score_col, geno_col = "Genotype") {
  genotypes <- levels(factor(data[[geno_col]]))
  g1 <- data[[score_col]][data[[geno_col]] == genotypes[1]]
  g2 <- data[[score_col]][data[[geno_col]] == genotypes[2]]

  cd  <- cliff.delta(g1, g2)
  wx  <- wilcox.test(g1, g2)

  paste0("δ = ", round(cd$estimate, 3),
         " (", cd$magnitude, ")",
         "\np = ", formatC(wx$p.value, format = "e", digits = 2))
}

###Figure 2c-d+Extended Data Figure 5a
#Violin + boxplot function
make_violin <- function(data, score_col, y_label,
                        trim = FALSE,
                        colors = c("#7C86FF", "#E69F00"),
                        geno_col = "Genotype") {

  genotypes   <- levels(factor(data[[geno_col]]))
  annot_label <- get_cliff_label(data, score_col, geno_col)
  y_max       <- max(data[[score_col]], na.rm = TRUE)

  ggplot(data, aes(x = .data[[geno_col]],
                   y = .data[[score_col]],
                   fill = .data[[geno_col]])) +
    geom_violin(width = 0.7, scale = "width", trim = trim) +
    geom_boxplot(notch  = TRUE, width = 0.30,
                 color  = "black", alpha = 0.5,
                 size   = 0.5, lwd = 0.5) +
    geom_signif(
      comparisons      = list(genotypes),
      annotations      = annot_label,
      y_position       = y_max * 1.08,   # sit just above the tallest violin
      tip_length       = 0.02,
      textsize         = 3.8,
      vjust            = 0.5
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = colors) +
    scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.05, 0.18))) +  # room for bracket
    theme_classic() +
    xlab("") +
    ylab(y_label) +
    theme(legend.position = "none",
          text = element_text(size = 15))
}

meta <- RPM_RPMA@meta.data

NE1       <- make_violin(meta, "NE1_score1",        "NE1 Signature")
NE2       <- make_violin(meta, "NE2_score1",        "NE2 Signature")
Secretory <- make_violin(meta, "secretory_score1",  "Secretory Signature")
nonNE1    <- make_violin(meta, "nonNE1_score1",     "nonNE1 Signature")
INT       <- make_violin(meta, "Intermediate_score1","Intermediate Signature")
nonNE2    <- make_violin(meta, "nonNE2_score1",     "nonNE2 Signature", trim = TRUE)

P1 <- NE1 + NE2 + Secretory + nonNE1 + INT + nonNE2 +
  plot_layout(ncol = 3) +
  plot_annotation(theme = theme(plot.margin = margin(10, 10, 10, 10)))

P1

#Signature correlation plot
Idents(RPM_RPMA) = "Genotype"
meta = RPM_RPMA@meta.data

signatures = meta[,c(31:75)]
signatures = signatures[,-c(4,6:11,13,16:17,22,25,27:38)]
signatures = as.matrix(signatures)

###Extended Data Figure 2b
cor_2<-rcorr(signatures)
cor_2[["P"]][!is.finite(cor_2[["P"]])] <- 0
corrplot( cor_2$r, order="AOE", tl.col = "black", method = 'square',
         p.mat = cor_2$P, sig.level = 0.01, insig = "blank", col = rev(COL2('PuOr', 20)), diag = FALSE)
